data.title: LERMA/ chosen as Hispanic AOR by National Pork Board to enhance pork's appeal to Hispanic consumers in the US.
data.description: In Dallas on October 23, 2025, the National Pork Board announced their collaboration with LERMA/ to enhance pork's significance and increase its popularity among Hispanic consumers in the United States. This strategic partnership aims to position pork as a key player in the market and strengthen its connection with the growing Hispanic demographic. This initiative underscores a forward-thinking approach to drive demand for pork and promote its cultural relevance, signaling a proactive strategy for the future of the industry.

data.title: NCOA seeks contractor for National Benefits Helpline for 31 months from Feb 1, 2026, to Aug 31, 2028.
data.description: NCOA's Center for Economic Well-Being is currently looking for a capable contractor to manage the National Benefits Helpline and Screening Service for a duration of 31 months, starting from February 1, 2026, until August 31, 2028. This service serves as an additional resource to support individuals by providing assistance and screening services.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market holds steady ahead of U.S. CPI data release; Bitcoin and Ethereum stable. Global market cap shows minor changes.
data.description: The value of prominent cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin and Ethereum stays steady while investors anticipate the release of U.S. Consumer Price Index (CPI) statistics. The overall market capitalization of cryptocurrencies worldwide experiences minor changes.

data.title: Dwyer Marble & Stone® marks 30 years, aims for growth and innovation.Leading distributor of natural stone celebrates milestone.
data.description: In Farmington Hills, Michigan, on October 23, 2025, Dwyer Marble & Stone®, a leading distributor in the Midwest of natural stone, quartz, and porcelain surfaces, marked its 30th anniversary. The company is known for its rapid growth and has become one of the largest distributors in the region. They are now embarking on an exciting new phase in their journey.

data.title: Waterford Crystal is back as the official crystal of the Times Square New Year's Eve Ball at One Times Square. Announcement made in New York on Oct. 23, 2025.
data.description: A new partnership has been announced between Waterford and One Times Square in New York City. This collaboration signifies the beginning of a new chapter centered on brilliance, heritage, and unity. One Times Square, renowned as the location of the iconic Times Square New Year's Eve Ball Drop Celebration, will now be integrated with Waterford in a historic move. This alliance, revealed on October 23, 2025, highlights the fusion of two prominent entities at a central moment in time for both organizations.

data.title: 200 destination leaders meet in Sacramento for Destinations International's 2025 Advocacy Summit; focuses on strategic leadership.
data.description: In a recent reputation and sentiment study, destination organizations gained crucial insights for strategic leadership. Taking place in Sacramento, California, nearly 200 destination leaders convened for Destinations International's 2025 Advocacy Summit on Oct. 23, 2025. The research provided valuable information regarding public perception and attitudes towards destinations, enabling organizations to make informed decisions. This gathering served as a platform for industry professionals to collaborate and enhance their understanding of key issues impacting the tourism sector.

data.title: Nava PBC releases 2025 Public Benefit Report showcasing role in enhancing federal gov services.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, Nava Public Benefit Corporation (Nava PBC) released its 2025 Public Benefit Report titled "Building long-term momentum for effective government services." The report underscores Nava's increasing contribution to federal services, emphasizing its commitment to enhancing government operations. Notable figures and achievements from the report showcase Nava's progression and impact in supporting efficient and effective public services.

data.title: New nonstop flight service between Monterey and Chicago, marking United Airlines return to mainline service at MRY.
data.description: United Airlines has introduced a new route connecting the famous Magnificent Mile to 17-Mile Drive, marking its return to mainline service at Monterey Regional Airport (MRY). The initiative was announced on October 23, 2025, in Monterey, California. The partnership involves the Monterey Peninsula Airport District (MPAD), See Monterey, and Visit. This connection signifies a significant shift in the airline's services and operations, bridging two renowned destinations with approximate distances of 2,000 miles and reintroducing United Airlines to the Monterey region.

data.title: Inventor develops paddle accessory for extended use, saving costs; aims to modernize pickleball equipment.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 23, 2025, an inventor from Irvine, California shared their creation of a modernized accessory aimed at pickleball players. The inventor expressed a desire to provide players with a durable paddle to use for an extended period, reducing the need for frequent costly purchases of new paddles. The newly invented PADDLE offers a solution to this issue and aims to benefit pickleball players by providing them with a long-lasting and cost-effective equipment option.

data.title: Binance founder CZ granted presidential pardon from Trump, allowing possible return to exchange.
data.description: On Wednesday, US President Donald Trump granted a pardon to the founder of Binance, paving the way for his potential comeback to the exchange.

data.title: Survey shows 6 in 10 Gen Zers leaning towards blue-collar jobs due to AI and job loss fears.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by ResumeTemplates.com in Seattle on October 23, 2025, highlights the trend of Gen Z individuals shifting towards trade professions. Findings from the survey of 1,250 Gen Z adults indicate a noticeable increase in the number of young Americans opting for blue-collar jobs as opposed to conventional career paths. This shift is attributed to concerns about artificial intelligence and job stability among this demographic.

data.title: Elevate Holistics CEO states cannabis is the next frontier. Telehealth leader specializes in medical cannabis. Pharma era is over.
data.description: Aspen Noonan, the CEO of Elevate Holistics, stated that plant medicine is not a small market but a significant movement. The company, based in Tulsa, Oklahoma, made this declaration on October 23, 2025. Elevate Holistics, a prominent telehealth provider in the United States, focuses on offering medical cannabis recommendations. Noonan believes that the era dominated by pharmaceuticals is shifting towards embracing plant-based remedies.

data.title: Investors in Quantum Corporation advised to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP before Nov. 15 if suffered losses.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who faced losses in Quantum Corporation to reach out to him directly to explore their potential courses of action. If you bought or obtained securities in Quantum Corporation within the period of November 15, 2024, and August 18, ..., it is advised to contact Mr. Wilson.

data.title: New Linear Bar protein bar offers 20g protein, 12g fiber, real chocolate, and no seed oils, redefining snacking.
data.description: Introducing the innovative Linear Bar, a protein-packed snack of the future. Each bar contains 20g of protein, 12g of fiber, and is free of seed oils. Infused with real chocolate, this organic protein bar sets a new standard for snacking. Produced in Duarte, Calif., the Linear Bar showcases the perfect balance between taste and nutrition.
